@board: # Peripheral signal routing (signal names are MCU-generic).
# Only signals that are actually routed in the CubeMX project belong here.
# usart1 (pa9/pa10) is still initialized by CubeMX but unused; the probe moved
# to UART5 (pc12/pd2). pa9/pa10 are reserved for TIM1_CH2/CH3 in the FOC stage.
# --- Planned FOC occupancy (Plan B; not yet routed by MX_TIM1/ADC1 init) ------
# Stage 2 freed the LCD pins (LTDC/I2C3/SPI5 init gated off via TARS_FEATURE_LCD)
# so TIM1's 6-channel complementary PWM + ADC1 injected sensing now fit. Promote
# these into [periph] above when stage 3 (hand-authored MX_TIM1/ADC1) lands.

stm32f429i-disc1: pa8      ; phase A high-side   (freed from I2C3_SCL)
pa7      ; phase A low-side    (freed from ACP_RST gpio)
pa9      ; phase B high-side   (freed from USART1_TX / probe)
pb0      ; phase B low-side    (freed from LTDC_R3)
pa10     ; phase C high-side   (freed from USART1_RX / probe)
pb1      ; phase C low-side    (freed from LTDC_R6)
pa6      ; break / nFAULT in   (freed from LTDC_G2)

@board: # Three-shunt phase-current + DC-bus sensing on ADC1 injected group:

stm32f429i-disc1: pc1    ; ADC1_IN11  phase A shunt amp  (freed from gyro CS)
pc3    ; ADC1_IN13  phase B shunt amp  (free)
pc4    ; ADC1_IN14  phase C shunt amp  (freed from OTG_FS_PSO)
pc5    ; ADC1_IN15  DC-bus divider     (freed from OTG_FS_OC)

@board: # B1 button stays on pa0. Gate driver must be 6-PWM (MCU generates dead-time).
# GPIO pins exposed to shell/API (pin name + optional board alias).
# User-controllable outputs: Morpho/CN5 expansion + on-board LEDs. Not wired to
# pa0/b1 is input-only (user button); readable but writes are rejected in firmware.
